tweets.text: At General Motors, we're celebrating 250 years of America one mile at a time. Thrilled to partner with @SecretaryDuffy & @USDOT on #Explore250 — a new app helping Americans discover iconic destinations across the country.

Kim has built a world-class HR organization that has been instrumental to our ongoing transformation. 

Thank you, Kim, and congratulations on your retirement.
